use_cases: Site-wide navigation with expandable category submenus
E-commerce product category browsing with icon-enhanced items
SaaS dashboard navigation with hierarchical menu structure
Portfolio or agency sites with service/product categorization
ai_summary: A responsive mega menu component featuring hover-activated submenus with smooth framer-motion animations. Supports multi-level navigation with icons, descriptions, and animated chevron indicators. Uses a layoutId-based hover background effect for cohesive visual feedback across menu items. Designed for dark-themed interfaces with clean typography and subtle white opacity variations.
